T

TIME_REDUCTION - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.time.TimeManager
The amount of seconds subtracted from the timer every reduction step.
timeLabel - Variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.controller.GameController
Label displaying the remaining time.
timeLeft - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.controller.LoseController
The time remaining when the player lost.
timeLeft - Variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.time.TimeManager
The remaining time in seconds for the current level.
timeLeftLabel - Variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.controller.LoseController
Label displaying the remaining time when the player lost.
timeManager - Variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.game.Game
The time manager responsible for tracking and updating the countdown.
TimeManager - Class in com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.time
Implementation of the ITimeManager interface.
TimeManager() - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.time.TimeManager
Constructs a new TimeManager instance.
timer - Variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.controller.GameController
Timeline used to manage the countdown timer.
